payload.notes: E08 Symphony Web UI Controller production-readiness closure for design principles, audit fixes, and validation proof.
payload.title: Web UI Design Principles And Validation

payload.evidence: Resolved US-069 Symphony Web UI production-readiness audit findings: active-run board refresh, retry communication separation, review error states, disabled artifact control, modal focus trap/restoration, accessible loading/error/status semantics, reduced-motion spinners, mobile first-viewport board visibility, long-value overflow bounds, feature status badge/API parse boundary/module extraction. Validation passed: npm web-ui build; npm web-ui e2e (17 Chromium tests); npm desktop:smoke; cargo test -p harness-symphony web -- --nocapture; cargo test --workspace; cargo fmt --check; cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings; git diff --check. Design-validation tooling clean skipped because no registered provider is present.
payload.verify_command: env -u HARNESS_DB_PATH -u HARNESS_RUN_ID -u HARNESS_RUN_MODE sh -c 'npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run build && npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run e2e && npm --prefix crates/harness-symphony/web-ui run desktop:smoke && cargo test -p harness-symphony web -- --nocapture && cargo test --workspace && cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && git diff --check'

payload.actions_taken: ["read Harness docs and US-069 audit files","used frontend production workflow orchestration with architecture/react and accessibility/design reviewer agents","added feature-owned API parse boundary and status mapping","extracted board sidebar detail review event-log and status modules","implemented active-run board polling","separated active retry communication from prior failed evidence","added explicit review loading/error states","implemented modal focus trap and focus restoration","added accessible loading alert and status semantics","fixed reduced-motion spinners mobile hierarchy long-value overflow and artifact control state","expanded Playwright coverage and ran full validation"]
payload.decisions_made: ["kept artifact opening disabled instead of faking filesystem access from the browser","used deterministic Playwright assertions as current design proof because no design-validation provider is registered","kept active-run board refresh polling bounded to active runs","preserved prior failed evidence separately instead of showing stale failed events as active communication"]
payload.errors: ["parallel build and E2E initially caused a transient static asset 404; reran validation sequentially","initial focus-restoration test exposed that opener focus needed an explicit task opener ref","initial long-value test exposed field/title wrapping gaps that were fixed"]
payload.harness_friction: No registered Harness providers are present for accessibility, performance-benchmark, coverage, or design-validation, so US-069 proof relies on build, Playwright, desktop smoke, Rust tests, and deterministic overflow/accessibility assertions.
payload.notes: Validation passed: npm web-ui build; npm web-ui e2e (17 Chromium tests); cargo test -p harness-symphony web -- --nocapture; cargo test --workspace; cargo fmt --check; cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings; npm web-ui desktop:smoke; git diff --check.
payload.task_summary: Resolved US-069 Symphony Web UI production-readiness audit findings
